title: BenchmarkQuestion
description: One element of benchmark/questions.json. Domain-neutral generalization of the geopolitics question format.

id.description: Stable, unique question id within the pack. Referenced by dev_questions.json and holdout_questions.json.

question.description: Prompt presented to the QA agent verbatim.

type.description: Question shape. Free-form domain string. Recommended baseline values (packs may extend): direct_fact, list, synthesis, comparison, causal, definition, numeric, other. Influences reporting only; the scorer keys off gold_points.

gold_points.description: Atomic facts or phrases the answer must cover. Primary scoring signal.

gold_points_min.description: Minimum number of gold_points that must be matched for the question to count as passed. <= len(gold_points).

answer.description: Human reference answer. Never fed to the scorer; used for author review only.

source_docs.description: Corpus filenames that cover this question. Used for pack authoring and debugging, not for scoring.

must_include.description: Legacy/auxiliary hard-required phrases. If present, all must appear. Prefer gold_points for new packs.

must_include_any.description: Legacy/auxiliary phrase pool. At least min_matches of these must appear.

min_matches.description: Minimum count from must_include_any. Required when must_include_any is set.
